Field.Label: Enter API Refresh Frequency in Seconds (minimum 15):
Enter Authorization Token (Bearer token):
Field.Description: Preferred auth method. Log into life360.com in a browser, open Developer Tools → Network, log in, find the POST to oauth2/token, and copy the access_token value. Paste just the token value here (without "Bearer ").

Field.Label: Plugin Config will not close unless API authentication passes. Check the Event Log for messages
Enable debugging:
Field.Description: (recommended to turn off after specific debug)
